$comment: UI flow map for alix-prototype. Each screen maps to a prototype under .designs/. Auto-maintained by the harness — Claude updates this whenever a prototype's UX structure changes (new screen, new modal, new CTA, new flow).

nodes.label: Trading Day Summary
nodes.summary: End-of-day dashboard for portfolio managers — KPIs, top movers, positions table, sleeve allocations, compliance rules. The flagship trading view.

nodes.label: Nala — Banca digital sin vueltas
nodes.summary: Marketing landing for a fictional neobank. Hero with virtual-card mock, dashboard preview, value props, CTA, footer. LATAM / Spanish, pre-login.

nodes.label: Settings (v1)
nodes.summary: Account settings with sticky side nav across 8 sections (Profile, Notifications, Display, Trading defaults, Data sources, API keys, Security, Danger zone).

nodes.label: Settings (v2)
nodes.summary: Reworked settings layout — iteration on v1 with a denser left rail and richer section descriptions.

nodes.label: Onboarding wizard
nodes.summary: Targeted by the Nala landing's primary CTA. Multi-step KYC + initial funding. Not yet prototyped.

nodes.label: Top NavBar
nodes.summary: Project-wide nav bar (project name, menu items, notifications, user profile). Reused across every screen — switches projectName per surface (TradingDesk, Nala, ...).

nodes.label: Positions table
nodes.summary: Sortable / filterable AG Grid showing holdings (symbol, sector, qty, P&L) inside the Trading Day Summary screen.

nodes.label: Dashboard preview (4 widgets)
nodes.summary: Embedded in the Nala landing. 2×2 grid: balance, last transactions, spending by category, quick actions. Acts as social proof for the product.

nodes.label: Settings side nav
nodes.summary: Sticky left nav on Settings v1/v2. Scrolls to the matching section on click.

nodes.label: Virtual card mock
nodes.summary: Decorative card render in the Nala hero — gradient, holder name, PAN, expiry. Tilted -3° on desktop.

nodes.label: AI Assistant drawer
nodes.summary: Right-edge slide-in drawer with a chat-style AI assistant. Opens from the Trading Day Summary.

nodes.label: Confirm destructive action
nodes.summary: Confirmation Dialog used in Settings' Danger zone before delete-account / revoke-keys actions.

nodes.label: Abre tu cuenta gratis
nodes.summary: Primary CTA on the Nala landing — entry to onboarding.

nodes.label: Ver cómo funciona
nodes.summary: Secondary CTA on the Nala landing — smooth-scrolls down to the dashboard preview.

nodes.label: Export positions
nodes.summary: From the Trading Day Summary, export the visible positions to CSV.

nodes.label: Save settings
nodes.summary: Sticky save bar at the bottom of the Settings screen. Disabled until changes exist.

steps.note: Onboarding is planned, not yet prototyped.
Sticky save bar dismisses on success.

flows.label: Confirm a destructive action
flows.trigger: Tap a danger-zone button in Settings

steps.note: v2 is the proposed replacement; review and merge.
